description: Nuxt pages, server routes, and auto-imported composables should be recognized as entrypoints

expectations.subject: server/api/hello.ts
expectations.note: Nuxt server API route -- auto-discovered entrypoint

expectations.subject: composables/useAuth.ts
expectations.note: Nuxt auto-imported composable -- should not be flagged

expectations.subject: src/unused.ts
expectations.note: File outside any Nuxt convention directory -- should be flagged
